ExpandedSlashingCriticalHits.Title: Critical Forge Expanded: Slashing Critical Hits
ExpandedSlashingCriticalHits.Description: Additional cards for critical weapon attacks that deal slashing damage. Activate this deck in the module settings for PF2E Critical Forge: Arsenal.

ExpandedPiercingCriticalHits.Title: Critical Forge Expanded: Piercing Critical Hits
ExpandedPiercingCriticalHits.Description: Additional cards for critical weapon attacks that deal piercing damage. Activate this deck in the module settings for PF2E Critical Forge: Arsenal.

ExpandedBludgeoningCriticalHits.Title: Critical Forge Expanded: Bludgeoning Critical Hits
ExpandedBludgeoningCriticalHits.Description: Additional cards for critical weapon attacks that deal bludgeoning damage. Activate this deck in the module settings for PF2E Critical Forge: Arsenal.

ExpandedSlashingCriticalFumbles.Title: Critical Forge Expanded: Slashing Critical Fumbles
ExpandedSlashingCriticalFumbles.Description: Additional cards for critical failures on weapon attacks that deal slashing damage. Activate this deck in the module settings for PF2E Critical Forge: Arsenal.

ExpandedPiercingCriticalFumbles.Title: Critical Forge Expanded: Piercing Critical Fumbles
ExpandedPiercingCriticalFumbles.Description: Additional cards for critical failures on weapon attacks that deal piercing damage. Activate this deck in the module settings for PF2E Critical Forge: Arsenal.

ExpandedBludgeoningCriticalFumbles.Title: Critical Forge Expanded: Bludgeoning Critical Fumbles
ExpandedBludgeoningCriticalFumbles.Description: Additional cards for critical failures on weapon attacks that deal bludgeoning damage. Activate this deck in the module settings for PF2E Critical Forge: Arsenal.

OpeningInTheGuard.Title: Opening in the Guard
OpeningInTheGuard.Description: The critical slash tears open the target's guard. It is off-guard for 1 round.

DraggingCut.Title: Dragging Cut
DraggingCut.Description: The cut catches muscle, hide, or equipment. All of the target's Speeds are reduced by 5 feet for 1 round.

BrokenRhythm.Title: Broken Rhythm
BrokenRhythm.Description: The sweeping wound ruins the target's timing. It takes a –1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls and Reflex saves for 1 round.

TornProtection.Title: Torn Protection
TornProtection.Description: Armor, hide, or magical protection parts along the cut. The target gains weakness 2 to slashing damage for 1 round.

CrimsonTrail.Title: Crimson Trail
CrimsonTrail.Description: The wound opens wide and inflicts 2d4 persistent bleed damage.

NeedleShock.Title: Needle Shock
NeedleShock.Description: The precise hit jars the target's grip. It takes a –1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls for 1 round.

PiercedStep.Title: Pierced Step
PiercedStep.Description: The point catches limb, clothing, or footing. The target's land Speed is reduced by 5 feet for 1 round.

NerveFlare.Title: Nerve Flare
NerveFlare.Description: A flash of pain disrupts thought. The target is stupefied 1 for 1 round.

ThreadTheGap.Title: Thread the Gap
ThreadTheGap.Description: The strike finds a flaw that remains exposed. The target gains weakness 2 to piercing damage for 1 round.

Transfixed.Title: Transfixed
Transfixed.Description: The target is caught in place. It is off-guard and takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to land Speed for 1 round.

ReboundingGuard.Title: Rebounding Guard
ReboundingGuard.Description: The perfect follow-through carries the attacker back into guard. It gains a +1 circumstance bonus to AC for 1 round.

RingingSenses.Title: Ringing Senses
RingingSenses.Description: The impact leaves the target's senses ringing. It takes a –1 circumstance penalty to Perception for 1 round.

BuckledStance.Title: Buckled Stance
BuckledStance.Description: The blow folds the target's stance. It is off-guard and its land Speed is reduced by 5 feet for 1 round.

CrushedBreath.Title: Crushed Breath
CrushedBreath.Description: The impact drives out breath and strength. The target takes a –1 circumstance penalty to Fortitude saves and Athletics checks for 1 round.

ConcussiveImpact.Title: Concussive Impact
ConcussiveImpact.Description: For one violent heartbeat the world stops moving. The target is stunned 1.

OverdrawnArc.Title: Overdrawn Arc
OverdrawnArc.Description: The missed cut travels too far. The attacker is off-guard for 1 round.

TwistedEdge.Title: Twisted Edge
TwistedEdge.Description: The weapon turns awkwardly in the grip. The attacker takes a –1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls for 1 round.

ArsenalOpenFlank.Title: Open Flank
ArsenalOpenFlank.Description: The sweeping miss carries the guard aside. The attacker takes a –1 circumstance penalty to AC for 1 round.

TangledFollowThrough.Title: Tangled Follow-Through
TangledFollowThrough.Description: Weapon, clothing, and footwork disagree at once. The attacker is clumsy 1 for 1 round.

SlashingLostTempo.Title: Lost Tempo
SlashingLostTempo.Description: The failed cut consumes the attacker’s rhythm. They are slowed 1 for 1 round.

OverextendedLunge.Title: Overextended Lunge
OverextendedLunge.Description: The failed thrust reaches beyond safe balance. The attacker is off-guard for 1 round.

LostLine.Title: Lost Line
LostLine.Description: The failed arc ruins the attacker’s line. They take a –1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls and AC for 1 round.

LockedShoulder.Title: Locked Shoulder
LockedShoulder.Description: The failed thrust jars arm and shoulder. The attacker is enfeebled 1 for 1 round.

MisjudgedDistance.Title: Misjudged Distance
MisjudgedDistance.Description: A badly judged step spoils distance and recovery. All Speeds are reduced by 5 feet and the attacker takes a –1 circumstance penalty to Reflex saves for 1 round.

SightlineSnared.Title: Sightline Snared
SightlineSnared.Description: Point, shaft, string, or sleeve crosses the sightline. The attacker is dazzled for 1 round.

RecoilShock.Title: Recoil Shock
RecoilShock.Description: The miss sends a punishing vibration through the grip. The attacker takes a –1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls for 1 round.

ReboundingGuardFumble.Title: Rebounding Guard
ReboundingGuardFumble.Description: The weapon rebounds out of line. The attacker is off-guard for 1 round.

NumbArms.Title: Numb Arms
NumbArms.Description: The impact travels back through weapon and arms. The attacker is enfeebled 1 for 1 round.

DustInTheEyes.Title: Dust in the Eyes
DustInTheEyes.Description: The wild impact throws up dust, splinters, or sparks. The attacker is dazzled for 1 round.

GroundWins.Title: The Ground Wins
GroundWins.Description: The missed melee blow drags the attacker’s balance down with it. They fall prone.

CleavingArc.Title: Cleaving Arc
CleavingArc.Description: The blade's broad path forces the target to recoil, imposing a -1 circumstance penalty to AC for 1 round.

Hamstrung.Title: Hamstrung
Hamstrung.Description: A low cut steals power from the target's stride, leaving it clumsy 1 for 1 round.

TornGuard.Title: Torn Guard
TornGuard.Description: The edge rips through guard and confidence, imposing a -1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls and AC for 1 round.

RendingStrike.Title: Rending Strike
RendingStrike.Description: The strike tears a ragged wound that inflicts 1d6 persistent bleed damage.

SweepingPressure.Title: Sweeping Pressure
SweepingPressure.Description: The relentless sweep leaves no room to settle, imposing a -1 circumstance penalty to Reflex saves for 1 round.

ExposedJoint.Title: Exposed Joint
ExposedJoint.Description: The point finds a working joint, imposing a -1 circumstance penalty to Reflex saves for 1 round.

PinpointPain.Title: Pinpoint Pain
PinpointPain.Description: A needle-fine burst of pain breaks concentration, imposing a -1 circumstance penalty to Will saves and spell attack rolls for 1 round.

FalteringGrip.Title: Faltering Grip
FalteringGrip.Description: The thrust strikes hand, wrist, or leverage, leaving the target enfeebled 1 for 1 round.

PreciseThrust.Title: Precise Thrust
PreciseThrust.Description: The point slips through a narrow opening, imposing a -1 circumstance penalty to AC and Fortitude saves for 1 round.

PinnedMomentum.Title: Pinned Momentum
PinnedMomentum.Description: The point catches the target at the worst possible angle, leaving it immobilized for 1 round.

DrivingSmash.Title: Driving Smash
DrivingSmash.Description: The blow drives the target backward through its own stance, leaving it clumsy 1 for 1 round.

BoneRattlingStrike.Title: Bone-Rattling Strike
BoneRattlingStrike.Description: The impact shakes strength from limb and grip, leaving the target enfeebled 1 for 1 round.

CrushedGuard.Title: Crushed Guard
CrushedGuard.Description: The target's defense collapses under the impact, imposing a -1 circumstance penalty to AC for 1 round.

StaggeringImpact.Title: Staggering Impact
StaggeringImpact.Description: The blow turns the battlefield sideways and knocks the target prone.

RattledFocus.Title: Rattled Focus
RattledFocus.Description: The impact scatters thought and aim, imposing a -1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls and Perception for 1 round.

SlipperyGrip.Title: Slippery Grip
SlipperyGrip.Description: The hilt shifts at the worst moment, imposing a -1 circumstance penalty to Athletics checks and attack rolls for 1 round.

WildFollowThrough.Title: Wild Follow-Through
WildFollowThrough.Description: The cut pulls the attacker into a sprawling recovery, reducing all Speeds by 5 feet for 1 round.

BlindedByMotion.Title: Blinded by Motion
BlindedByMotion.Description: The sweeping weapon, cloak, or debris crosses the attacker's vision, leaving them dazzled for 1 round.

CutShort.Title: Cut Short
CutShort.Description: The failed swing jars the attacker's rhythm, imposing a -1 circumstance penalty to Reflex saves for 1 round.

SpinningRecovery.Title: Spinning Recovery
SpinningRecovery.Description: The missed arc leaves the attacker dizzy and exposed, making them clumsy 1 and off-guard for 1 round.

TwistedWrist.Title: Twisted Wrist
TwistedWrist.Description: The thrust turns against the wrist, leaving the attacker clumsy 1 for 1 round.

BrokenMeasure.Title: Broken Measure
BrokenMeasure.Description: The failed point attack ruins distance and timing, imposing a -1 circumstance penalty to AC for 1 round.

SnaggedPoint.Title: Snagged Point
SnaggedPoint.Description: The point catches on armor, terrain, or its own line, reducing all Speeds by 5 feet for 1 round.

FalteringFocus.Title: Faltering Focus
FalteringFocus.Description: The missed line leaves the attacker second-guessing every opening, imposing a -1 circumstance penalty to Will saves for 1 round.

FullCommitment.Title: Full Commitment
FullCommitment.Description: The attacker commits everything to empty space and is slowed 1 for 1 round.

HeavyRecovery.Title: Heavy Recovery
HeavyRecovery.Description: The weapon's weight drags the attacker behind the fight, reducing all Speeds by 5 feet for 1 round.

JarringMiss.Title: Jarring Miss
JarringMiss.Description: The failed impact shakes the attacker's senses, imposing a -1 circumstance penalty to Perception and Reflex saves for 1 round.

OvercommittedSmash.Title: Overcommitted Smash
OvercommittedSmash.Description: The attacker's whole frame follows the miss, leaving them clumsy 1 for 1 round.

RattledGuardFumble.Title: Rattled Guard
RattledGuardFumble.Description: The rebound shakes weapon and defense out of alignment, imposing a -1 circumstance penalty to AC for 1 round.

CrushingRecoil.Title: Crushing Recoil
CrushingRecoil.Description: The missed blow punishes the attacker with its own force, leaving them enfeebled 1 and off-guard for 1 round.

SeveredStance.Title: Severed Stance
SeveredStance.Description: The cut tears through balance and leverage. The target takes a –1 circumstance penalty to Fortitude and Reflex saves for 1 round.

BloodInTheEyes.Title: Blood in the Eyes
BloodInTheEyes.Description: The slash sends blood, splinters, or torn material across the target’s vision. It is dazzled for 1 round.

HookedCut.Title: Hooked Cut
HookedCut.Description: The edge catches clothing, armor, or flesh. The target’s land Speed is reduced by 10 feet for 1 round.

RaggedOpening.Title: Ragged Opening
RaggedOpening.Description: The cut leaves a jagged gap in the target’s defense. It gains weakness 2 to piercing damage for 1 round.

SplitDefense.Title: Split Defense
SplitDefense.Description: The sweeping blow tears offense and defense apart. The target is off-guard and takes a –1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls for 1 round.

NumbedArm.Title: Numbed Arm
NumbedArm.Description: The point strikes a nerve or joint. The target is clumsy 1 for 1 round.

StolenBreath.Title: Stolen Breath
StolenBreath.Description: The thrust finds a breath-stealing point. The target is slowed 1 for 1 round.

AnchoredFoot.Title: Anchored Foot
AnchoredFoot.Description: The strike catches foot, hem, or footing. The target’s land Speed is reduced by 10 feet for 1 round.

ThreadedGap.Title: Threaded Gap
ThreadedGap.Description: The point marks a precise route through the target’s protection. It gains weakness 2 to piercing damage for 1 round.

EyeLine.Title: Eye-Line
EyeLine.Description: The point flashes past the target’s eyes and breaks its focus. It is dazzled for 1 round.

Winded.Title: Winded
Winded.Description: The impact empties the target’s lungs. It is slowed 1 for 1 round.

RingingEars.Title: Ringing Ears
RingingEars.Description: The blow floods the target’s senses with noise. It is dazzled for 1 round.

BuckledKnees.Title: Buckled Knees
BuckledKnees.Description: The strike buckles the target’s stance. All its Speeds are reduced by 5 feet for 1 round.

ConcussiveGap.Title: Concussive Gap
ConcussiveGap.Description: The impact cracks open body and guard. The target takes a –1 circumstance penalty to AC and Fortitude saves for 1 round.

DislocatedGuard.Title: Dislocated Guard
DislocatedGuard.Description: The blow knocks strength and defense out of alignment. The target is enfeebled 1 and off-guard for 1 round.

KissedTheFloor.Title: Kissed the Floor
KissedTheFloor.Description: The blade bites ground or debris and drags the attacker down. They fall prone.

OpenFlank.Title: Open Flank
OpenFlank.Description: The wide miss exposes the attacker’s side. They are off-guard for 1 round.

SnaggedEdge.Title: Snagged Edge
SnaggedEdge.Description: The edge catches on armor, scenery, or its own path. The attacker is clumsy 1 for 1 round.

TangledRecovery.Title: Tangled Recovery
TangledRecovery.Description: Weapon, clothing, and momentum knot together. All the attacker’s Speeds are reduced by 10 feet for 1 round.

WrongDistance.Title: Wrong Distance
WrongDistance.Description: The attacker badly misjudges reach and timing. They take a –1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls for 1 round.

CrossedEyes.Title: Crossed Eyes
CrossedEyes.Description: The point flashes back across the attacker’s sightline. They are dazzled for 1 round.

StuckInTheMoment.Title: Stuck in the Moment
StuckInTheMoment.Description: The point catches and the attacker freezes around it. They are slowed 1 for 1 round.

DeadWeight.Title: Dead Weight
DeadWeight.Description: The weapon’s momentum turns to dead weight. The attacker is slowed 1 for 1 round.

ReboundShock.Title: Rebound Shock
ReboundShock.Description: The blow rebounds through arms and shoulders. The attacker is enfeebled 1 for 1 round.

ShatteredFooting.Title: Shattered Footing
ShatteredFooting.Description: The miss pounds the attacker’s stance apart. All their Speeds are reduced by 10 feet for 1 round.

RingingSkull.Title: Ringing Skull
RingingSkull.Description: The recoil rattles the attacker’s senses. They are dazzled for 1 round.

CavedInGuard.Title: Caved-In Guard
CavedInGuard.Description: The heavy miss caves in the attacker’s own defense. They are off-guard and take a –1 circumstance penalty to Reflex saves for 1 round.

ExposedSide.Title: Open Flank
ExposedSide.Description: The wide miss exposes the attacker’s side. They are off-guard for 1 round.

RecklessLunge.Title: Overextended Lunge
RecklessLunge.Description: The attacker lunges beyond their balance and falls prone.

SprainedWrist.Title: Twisted Wrist
SprainedWrist.Description: The failed thrust twists the attacker’s wrist. They are enfeebled 1 for 1 round.
